data.title: Leelanau Conservancy aims to revive Sugar Loaf for public access, with help from community to raise funds. Landowners pledge to donate the property.
data.description: Community support has successfully raised the required funds, leading to generous landowners committing to donating the esteemed Sugar Loaf property in Leelanau County, Michigan. This historic landscape, a prominent feature in Northern Michigan, is set for a significant revival. The notable donation of the Sugar Loaf property marks a pivotal moment in its history.

data.title: American Tungsten Corp increases private placement from $2.5M to $7.0M. Not for US dissemination.
data.description: This information is not intended for distribution in the United States or through U.S. newswire services.

data.title: FOX News Digital has its best quarter ever with total unique multiplatform visitors, hitting 1.2 billion views on YouTube, surpassing competitors. CNN's viewership drops to its lowest since 2015.
data.description: FOX News achieved its highest quarter viewership on YouTube, gaining 1.2 billion views, surpassing major news brands like ABC, CBS, and NBC News. In contrast, CNN experienced its lowest quarter in terms of multiplatform views and minutes since 2015. This news was reported on July 17, 2025, in New York, highlighting FOX News Digital's significant success on the platform.

data.title: Public interest in climate change is declining, with recent polls showing it is not a priority for most North Americans, according to Friends of Science Society.
data.description: According to recent polls, a majority of North Americans are no longer prioritizing climate change action, as reported by Friends of Science Society. This contradicts the 89% support for climate action advocacy by Covering Climate Now. The findings also go against claims made by Canada's Abacus Data about a surge in public interest in addressing climate change.

data.title: Possible 300% DOGE price surge if key level is regained, 18% increase this week suggests potential 300% rise by 2025.
data.description: This week, DOGE experienced an increase of 18%, bolstering hopes for a potential rally of 300% by the conclusion of 2025 as indicated by various data points.

data.title: AXT, Inc. announces passing of Board Member Christine Russell who joined in 2019; she passed on July 11, 2025.
data.description: In FREMONT, Calif., a prominent manufacturer of compound semiconductor substrates, AXT, Inc. (NasdaqGS: AXTI), announced the passing of Ms. Christine Russell, a valued member of the Company’s Board of Directors, on July 11, 2025. Ms. Russell had been serving on the Board since December 2019 as an independent director. She held the position of Chair of the Audit Committee and was an active member of the Compensation Committee and the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee. AXT expressed its deep sorrow at the loss.

data.title: TAO Synergies buys $10M of Bittensor (TAO), holds 29,899 TAO tokens, aiming for yield generation.
data.description: As of now, 29,899 TAO tokens have been bought, which are then staked in a decentralized AI network to generate yield. In New York on July 17, 2025, TAO Synergies Inc. (Nasdaq: TAOX) revealed this information. They are a digital asset treasury company specializing in Bittensor (TAO), considered the leading crypto token.

data.title: Morales Beverage Group names Matthew Gallery as new Chief Sales Officer, boosting expertise in premium alcohol sales.
data.description: In Houston on July 17, 2025, Morales Beverage Group, a prominent company in premium alcohol beverage distribution, shared the exciting news of Matthew Gallery's appointment as the new Chief Sales Officer. Gallery brings a wealth of experience in sales leadership and a successful history in the field to the table, promising to contribute significantly to the company's growth.

data.title: PDF Solutions (Nasdaq: PDFS) to report Q2 fiscal 2025 results on Aug 7, 2025. Teleconference with CEO and CFO at 2pm PT / 5pm ET.
data.description: PDF Solutions, Inc., a top provider of data solutions for the semiconductor industry, is set to announce its Second quarter fiscal 2025 financial results on Thursday, August 7, 2025, after the market closes. The CEO, John Kibarian, and CFO, Adnan Raza, will lead a live teleconference the same day at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET to review the results. PDFS, listed on Nasdaq, is headquartered in Santa Clara, Calif. Stay tuned for the latest updates on their performance.

data.title: Butler National Corp (OTCQX: BUKS) establishes new governance guidelines, including mandatory director retirement policy.
data.description: Butler National Corporation (OTCQX: BUKS) based in New Century, Kansas, has unveiled new guidelines that require directors to retire at a certain age. The company is a prominent player in the worldwide market for aircraft modification, maintenance, and repair, as well as gaming services. The policy change was announced on July 17, 2025.

data.title: Canary Capital invests in Injective with staked ETF filing after SEC guidance on staking rewards as income. #blockchain
data.description: Following recent SEC guidance that categorizes staking rewards as income, asset managers such as Canary are now able to support blockchain-based tokens by engaging in delegated staking. This development allows for greater participation in the staking process, with market observers noting a significant increase in interest from asset managers.

data.title: Becker Milk Company Annual Results: Revenues $2,992,082 (2025), Net Income $1.57/share, a significant increase from 2024.
data.description: The Becker Milk Company Limited reported its financial results for the year ended April 30, 2025. Total revenues were $2,992,082, a slight decrease from $3,045,648 in 2024. Net Operating Income was $2,386,854 compared to $2,375,060 in 2024. Net income per share was $1.57, a significant increase from $0.07 in 2024. Total revenue improvement was $53,566, driven by higher property revenue and finance income. Net income attributable to common and special shareholders was $2,847,590. Average shares outstanding were 1,808,360. The improvement in net income was $2,723,112, attributed to various factors including an increase in property revenue and reduction in environmental liability.

data.title: XRP and Ethereum surge, hitting record highs today. Solana could be next, given positive technical signals.
data.description: Today, XRP reached record highs, while Ethereum experienced significant gains over the past week. Solana is projected to be on a similar trajectory based on technical analysis.

data.title: House passed 3 key bills: CLARITY market structure bill, GENIUS stablecoin bill, and Anti-CBDC bill, marking major wins for crypto.
data.description: On Thursday, the House approved three significant bills related to digital assets. These include the CLARITY market structure bill for digital assets, the GENIUS stablecoin bill, and an Anti-CBDC bill. This move marks a successful Crypto Week, with these key bills passing in the House. The bills aim to bring clarity to the market structure for digital assets, regulate stablecoins like GENIUS, and establish safeguards against Central Bank Digital Currencies. This development is seen as a major victory for the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: Abbott Labs stock drops 8% due to below-expected organic sales outlook for 2025, despite beating quarterly estimates.
data.description: Shares of Abbott took a hit on Thursday as the healthcare corporation provided a conservative forecast for its organic sales in 2025. Despite exceeding quarterly expectations, the stock plummeted by 8%, causing concern among investors. This unexpected guidance miss put pressure on Abbott Laboratories, which has been a reliable player in the market. Investors reacted to the news, resulting in a significant drop in the stock price. This downturn came after the company's positive quarterly performance, indicating a discrepancy between short-term success and long-term projections. The market's reaction underscored the importance of forward-looking guidance and its impact on investor confidence.

data.title: Blackstone stock up 6.6% this week, poised for 5th consecutive weekly gain, showing strong technical performance.
data.description: Blackstone has seen a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improved technical performance. The stock has surged by 6.6% this week, marking the fifth consecutive week of gains. Investors are now wondering if this positive momentum will be sustained.

data.title: North American Construction Group Ltd. will report Q2 results on August 13, 2025, with a conference call on August 14 at 7:00 am MT.
data.description: Acheson, Alberta, July 17, 2025 - The North American Construction Group Ltd. (NACG) will unveil its financial performance for the second quarter ending June 30, 2025, on August 13, 2025, post markets closure. An ensuing conference call and webcast are scheduled for August 14, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. MT (9:00 a.m. ET). NACG, trading as NOA.TO/NYSE:NOA, will provide insights into its Q2 figures during this event. Stay tuned for further updates on the company’s financial standing.
